class.name: GDKMultiplayerActivity
class.brief_description: Multiplayer activity service accessed via GDK.multiplayer_activity.
class.description: Manages Xbox multiplayer activities, invites, and recent players. Set your game's activity with [method set_activity_async], send invites with [method send_invites_async], and handle incoming invites via signals. Invite signals are forwarded from [GDKActivation]'s single native activation subscription so payloads match [signal GDKActivation.pending_invite_received] and [signal GDKActivation.invite_accepted].

method.name: set_activity_async
method.description: Sets the multiplayer activity for the given local user. Await the returned completion [Signal] to receive the final [GDKResult].

method.name: get_activities_async
method.description: Queries multiplayer activities for the specified users. Results are cached and accessible via [method get_cached_activity].

method.name: get_cached_activity
method.description: Returns the cached [GDKMultiplayerActivityInfo] for the given XUID, or [code]null[/code] if not cached.

method.name: delete_activity_async
method.description: Deletes the multiplayer activity for the given local user.

method.name: send_invites_async
method.description: Sends multiplayer invites to the specified users.

method.name: show_invite_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system invite UI for the given local user.

method.name: update_recent_players
method.description: Updates the recent players list for the given local user.

method.name: flush_recent_players_async
method.description: Flushes the recent players batch to the Xbox service.

method.name: accept_pending_invite
method.description: Accepts a pending invite by its URI.

signal.name: activities_updated
signal.description: Emitted when multiplayer activities have been updated for the specified XUIDs.

signal.name: pending_invite_received
signal.description: Emitted when a pending multiplayer invite has been received. The parsed [param invite] dictionary includes [code]raw_uri[/code], [code]activation_type[/code], [code]scheme[/code], [code]action[/code], and decoded query fields such as [code]sender_xuid[/code].

signal.name: invite_accepted
signal.description: Emitted when a multiplayer invite has been accepted. The dictionary shape matches [signal pending_invite_received].
